message:
fix(web): Add Suspense boundary for AnalyticsProvider and fix sitemap route

- Wrap AnalyticsProvider in Suspense to fix useSearchParams build error
  on /cookies page during static generation
- Update sitemap/[id]/route.ts to use async params (Next.js 16 API)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
